9001.name: Gates of the Afterlife
9001.description: Massive golden gates stand between the living and the dead. A robed figure checks a very long list.
ambient: The air here feels heavier than it should.
A wisp of golden light drifts past, then fades.
A feather drifts down from nowhere. It's warm to the touch.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.

9002.name: Spirit Path  -  West
9002.description: A path of clouds stretches westward. Souls drift past like leaves on a river.
ambient: A wisp of golden light drifts past, then fades.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.
The lanterns flicker in unison, then steady themselves.

9003.name: Spirit Path  -  Central
9003.description: The main road of the afterlife. Spirits of all kinds travel here. Some remember who they were.
ambient: The list the gatekeeper holds seems to grow longer as you watch.
Someone whispers your name. When you turn, no one is there.
The air here feels heavier than it should.

9004.name: Spirit Path  -  East
9004.description: The path narrows and descends. The light dims. This way leads to darker places.
ambient: The ground hums beneath your feet  -  a low, patient vibration.
Someone whispers your name. When you turn, no one is there.
The gates creak slightly, as if something pressed against them from the other side.
The robed figure at the gates mutters something about quotas.
A feather drifts down from nowhere. It's warm to the touch.

9005.name: Heaven's Garden
9005.description: An impossible garden of perfect flowers. The temperature is always comfortable. Peace radiates. The spectral residents here seem agitated. Several ghosts are clustered around a spot where the ethereal mist has been burned away, leaving a perfect circle of absolute clarity.

interactables.name: circle
interactables.description: The circle of clarity is about three feet across. Within it, you can see the ground with perfect, almost painful sharpness  -  every grain of dirt, every blade of grass rendered in impossible detail. The ghosts whisper that something 'too real' passed through here, burning away the veil between life and death. One ghost keeps repeating: 'Round. It was round. And it was ANGRY.'

ambient: A wisp of golden light drifts past, then fades.
The air here feels heavier than it should.
Someone whispers your name. When you turn, no one is there.
A feather drifts down from nowhere. It's warm to the touch.

9006.name: Hall of Heroes
9006.description: Statues of the greatest warriors who ever lived. Their spirits train here eternally.
ambient: A wisp of golden light drifts past, then fades.
The lanterns flicker in unison, then steady themselves.
A faint smell of flowers  -  funeral flowers  -  passes quickly.
You hear distant chanting, just below the threshold of understanding.
The air here feels heavier than it should.

9007.name: The Judgment Hall
9007.description: A vast courtroom where deeds are weighed. The scales are impossibly precise.
ambient: A wisp of golden light drifts past, then fades.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.
A moth circles the nearest lantern, casting erratic shadows.
The ground hums beneath your feet  -  a low, patient vibration.
A faint smell of flowers  -  funeral flowers  -  passes quickly.

9008.name: Purgatory  -  Waiting Room
9008.description: Uncomfortable chairs and old magazines. The wait is eternal. A number dispenser reads '∞.'
ambient: You hear distant chanting, just below the threshold of understanding.
The robed figure at the gates mutters something about quotas.
Someone whispers your name. When you turn, no one is there.
The gates creak slightly, as if something pressed against them from the other side.
The ground hums beneath your feet  -  a low, patient vibration.

ambient: A moth circles the nearest lantern, casting erratic shadows.
You hear distant chanting, just below the threshold of understanding.
The air here feels heavier than it should.

9010.name: Elysian Fields

ambient: The list the gatekeeper holds seems to grow longer as you watch.
The gates creak slightly, as if something pressed against them from the other side.
A faint breeze carries the scent of incense and old paper.

9011.name: Training Grounds of the Dead
9011.description: Spirits of warriors spar endlessly. Death has not dulled their skills. If anything, they've improved.
ambient: A wisp of golden light drifts past, then fades.
You hear distant chanting, just below the threshold of understanding.
The gates creak slightly, as if something pressed against them from the other side.
The robed figure at the gates mutters something about quotas.

9012.name: Hall of the Hourglass
9012.description: An enormous hourglass stands in the center of the room, completely empty. Time moves strangely here  -  your shadow arrives before you do.
ambient: The walls remember a king who never existed.
Time holds its breath here.
The throne is empty. It has always been empty. It will always be empty.
A crown lies on the floor. It weighs more than it should.

9013.name: Limbo  -  Grey Expanse
9013.description: An endless grey plain. Nothing happens here. Nothing ever will. The ultimate punishment: boredom.
ambient: You hear distant chanting, just below the threshold of understanding.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.
A wisp of golden light drifts past, then fades.

ambient: Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.
Someone whispers your name. When you turn, no one is there.
The lanterns flicker in unison, then steady themselves.
A moth circles the nearest lantern, casting erratic shadows.
A feather drifts down from nowhere. It's warm to the touch.

ambient: The gates creak slightly, as if something pressed against them from the other side.
The ground hums beneath your feet  -  a low, patient vibration.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.

ambient: The robed figure at the gates mutters something about quotas.
A faint breeze carries the scent of incense and old paper.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.

9017.name: Snake Way  -  Middle
9017.description: The path continues endlessly. Your legs burn. The end is not visible. Keep going.
ambient: The ground hums beneath your feet  -  a low, patient vibration.
A faint smell of flowers  -  funeral flowers  -  passes quickly.
The air here feels heavier than it should.
The robed figure at the gates mutters something about quotas.

9018.name: Snake Way  -  End

ambient: The ground hums beneath your feet  -  a low, patient vibration.
The robed figure at the gates mutters something about quotas.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.
The list the gatekeeper holds seems to grow longer as you watch.

You hear distant chanting, just below the threshold of understanding.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.
The gates creak slightly, as if something pressed against them from the other side.

9020.description: A tiny planet with its own gravity. A small house, a car, and a monkey. The master trains only the worthy.
ambient: A wisp of golden light drifts past, then fades.
The lanterns flicker in unison, then steady themselves.
A faint breeze carries the scent of incense and old paper.
The ground hums beneath your feet  -  a low, patient vibration.

ambient: A moth circles the nearest lantern, casting erratic shadows.
The list the gatekeeper holds seems to grow longer as you watch.
The gates creak slightly, as if something pressed against them from the other side.

9022.description: Beyond this, even spirits cannot return. Whatever lies past is truly the end. Or the beginning.
ambient: A faint smell of flowers  -  funeral flowers  -  passes quickly.
The lanterns flicker in unison, then steady themselves.
Somewhere beyond the gates, a bell tolls once.

4001.name: Firebase Alpha  -  Command
4001.description: A reinforced bunker with maps and radios. The CO barks orders. Shells land in the distance.
ambient: A spent magazine clatters from a ledge above.
Radio static crackles from a forgotten handset.
A helicopter passes overhead, its searchlight sweeping the ground.
The radio hisses: '...all units, hold position...' then cuts out.
Somewhere, a soldier is humming a song you almost recognize.

4002.name: Firebase Alpha  -  Armory
4002.description: Racks of weapons behind chain-link. The quartermaster logs everything. Everything.
ambient: A helicopter passes overhead, its searchlight sweeping the ground.
Somewhere, a soldier is humming a song you almost recognize.
Boots thud somewhere nearby  -  a patrol passing through.
Radio static crackles from a forgotten handset.
The air tastes of metal and smoke.

4003.name: Firebase Alpha  -  Barracks
4003.description: Rows of cots. Personal effects tucked under pillows. Letters from home pinned to the walls.
ambient: Barbed wire creaks in the wind.
Shell casings roll underfoot with a metallic whisper.
Thunder rolls  -  or is it ordnance? Hard to tell anymore.

4004.name: Firebase Alpha  -  Mess Hall

ambient: A helicopter passes overhead, its searchlight sweeping the ground.
Someone is shouting orders in the distance, barely audible.
A flare arcs across the sky, bathing everything in red for a moment.
A rat darts between sandbags, unbothered by the chaos.

4005.name: Firebase Alpha  -  Motor Pool

ambient: The ground trembles from artillery fire to the north.
A dog tag glints in the mud, half-buried.
Boots thud somewhere nearby  -  a patrol passing through.
Somewhere, a soldier is humming a song you almost recognize.

ambient: Shell casings roll underfoot with a metallic whisper.
The smell of cordite and diesel hangs in the air.
Barbed wire creaks in the wind.
A distant explosion shakes dust from the ceiling.

4020.name: Ruined Village  -  Center
4020.description: The village square. A fountain with no water. A clock tower with no hands. A massive impact crater dominates the landscape here. Unlike the bomb craters nearby, this one is perfectly spherical, and the ground at its center has been compressed into a mirror-smooth surface.

south.description: A locked door blocks the way.

interactables.name: impact
interactables.description: The crater is too perfect to be a weapon impact. The compressed earth at the center reflects your face like polished glass. Radiation readings are off the charts  -  but it's not nuclear radiation. It's something else entirely. A nearby soldier's journal, half-buried in ash, contains a final entry: 'Saw it fall from the sky. Round. Perfect. Alive.'

ambient: Shell casings roll underfoot with a metallic whisper.
A dog tag glints in the mud, half-buried.
Somewhere, a soldier is humming a song you almost recognize.

The air grows warmer. You hear growling from the shadows.

  Tip: Your four core stats  -  Vigor, Precision, Grit, Instinct  -  grow
  through combat. Take hits to build Grit. Land hits to build Precision.
ambient: The walls bear scorch marks from overeager students.
The stairs creak under a weight that isn't yours.
The air smells of healing salve and determination.
Torchlight flickers as a draft sweeps through the stairwell.
A wooden sword leans against the wall, its edge splintered.

106.name: Training Tower  -  Sixth Floor
106.description:
A rest alcove with a stone bench and a water basin.

  Tip: Type REST to recover HP and Focus between fights.
  Safe rooms (marked with a flag) prevent combat.
ambient: A training manual lies open on a bench, pages dog-eared.
The sound of combat echoes from floors above.
A chalkboard lists today's exercises. Most are crossed out.
The air smells of healing salve and determination.

107.name: Training Tower  -  Seventh Floor
107.description:
Bones litter the floor. The walls are scratched with claw marks.

  Tip: Stronger enemies give more power. Fight things near your level
  for the best growth.
ambient: A motivational carving reads: 'Pain is temporary. Power is earned.'
The air smells of healing salve and determination.
A training manual lies open on a bench, pages dog-eared.

108.name: Training Tower  -  Eighth Floor
108.description:
A narrow corridor with arrow slits in the walls. You feel watched.

  Tip: Some enemies are AGGRESSIVE and attack on sight.
  Others are passive  -  you choose when to fight them.
ambient: A wooden sword leans against the wall, its edge splintered.
Torchlight flickers as a draft sweeps through the stairwell.
The air smells of healing salve and determination.

109.name: Training Tower  -  Ninth Floor
109.description:
A forge room. An anvil sits cold and unused, but the coals still glow faintly.

  Tip: Visit MERCHANTS to buy and sell gear. Type SHOP near one.
  The Bazaar in the Nexus has merchants.
ambient: The sound of combat echoes from floors above.
A practice dummy's straw stuffing litters the floor.
A wooden sword leans against the wall, its edge splintered.
The stairs creak under a weight that isn't yours.
The tower hums with the energy of a hundred small ambitions.

110.name: Training Tower  -  Tenth Floor
110.description:
The stairwell widens into a dueling ring. Torches blaze on all sides.

  Tip: As you gain power, you'll unlock ABILITIES  -  special attacks
  that cost Focus. Type the ability name to use it in combat.
ambient: The walls bear scorch marks from overeager students.
The air smells of healing salve and determination.
A chalkboard lists today's exercises. Most are crossed out.
The sound of combat echoes from floors above.
Sweat stains mark the stone where students have rested.

111.name: Training Tower  -  Eleventh Floor
111.description:
Wind howls through open windows. You can see the Nexus far below.

  Tip: The BULLETIN BOARD in the Nexus offers quests.
  Complete quests to earn Quest Points for the Quest Shop.
ambient: A bell rings from the top floor  -  someone completed a trial.
A wooden sword leans against the wall, its edge splintered.
Dust falls from the ceiling as someone lands heavily upstairs.
You hear encouraging shouts from somewhere above.
The walls bear scorch marks from overeager students.

112.name: Training Tower  -  Twelfth Floor
112.description:
A library of sorts. Dusty tomes line crumbling shelves.

  Tip: SAY things to NPCs  -  they respond to keywords like
  'hello', 'quest', 'help', 'buy', and 'lore'.
ambient: A motivational carving reads: 'Pain is temporary. Power is earned.'
The walls bear scorch marks from overeager students.
The sound of combat echoes from floors above.
A bell rings from the top floor  -  someone completed a trial.

113.name: Training Tower  -  Thirteenth Floor
113.description:
The walls pulse with a faint red glow. Something powerful waits above.

  Tip: RECALL teleports you to your recall point (default: the Nexus).
  Type SET RECALL in a safe room to change it.
ambient: The air smells of healing salve and determination.
You hear encouraging shouts from somewhere above.
A chalkboard lists today's exercises. Most are crossed out.
A practice dummy's straw stuffing litters the floor.

114.name: Training Tower  -  Fourteenth Floor
114.description:
A meditation chamber. Incense burns in brass holders.

  Tip: The world beyond the Nexus is divided into themed zones.
  Each gateway leads to a different genre  -  fantasy, sci-fi, noir, and more.
  Explore them all, but beware: some zones are dangerous for the unprepared.
ambient: A training manual lies open on a bench, pages dog-eared.
Sweat stains mark the stone where students have rested.
A wooden sword leans against the wall, its edge splintered.
The tower hums with the energy of a hundred small ambitions.
Dust falls from the ceiling as someone lands heavily upstairs.

115.name: Training Tower  -  Summit
115.description:
You stand at the top of the tower. The entire Nexus spreads below you, its six gateways glowing with different colors. A grizzled instructor leans against the parapet.

  'You've made it to the top. You're ready for the real world now.'
  'Head back down and explore the gateways. Your marble is out there somewhere.'
ambient: Sweat stains mark the stone where students have rested.
A training manual lies open on a bench, pages dog-eared.
A chalkboard lists today's exercises. Most are crossed out.
A wooden sword leans against the wall, its edge splintered.
A bell rings from the top floor  -  someone completed a trial.

150.name: The Quest Shop
150.description:
A cozy alcove beneath the Bulletin Board. Shelves line every wall, packed with useful gear, rare consumables, and mysterious trinkets  -  all available for Quest Points.

A cheerful shopkeeper stands behind a counter cluttered with oddities.

  Type QUEST SHOP to browse. Type QUEST BUY <number> to purchase.
ambient: The Pinnacle hums with the memory of everyone who stood here before you.
A crack in the air seals itself before you can look directly at it.
The void between worlds pulses with distant light.
The walls breathe. Slowly. Patiently.
You hear music from a world you've never visited.

1125.name: Ruins of Aldric's Tower
1125.description: What was once a proud wizard's tower is now a catastrophe of shattered stone and scattered parchment. A massive hole has been punched clean through the eastern and western walls  -  the trajectory curves impossibly upward between entry and exit. Scorched books, melted instruments, and fragments of glowing wards litter the floor. The wizard Aldric paces among the ruins, alternating between fury and fascination.

interactables.name: hole
interactables.description: The entry hole on the east wall is a perfect circle about three inches across. The exit hole on the west wall  -  two floors up  -  is identical. Between them, the path of destruction curves in a smooth arc, as if the sphere was banking like a bird in flight. Aldric has marked the trajectory with red string pinned to the walls. His notes in the margin read: 'Intentional? Playful? MALICIOUS?'

interactables.name: notes
interactables.description: Scattered pages of dense arcane notation. Most are damaged beyond reading, but one fragment catches your eye: '...energy signature consistent with extra-dimensional origin. Object appears to exist in multiple planes simultaneously. Containment impossible with current methods. Recommend: DO NOT ATTEMPT TO STOP. Redirect only. If redirection fails: RUN.'

interactables.name: instruments
interactables.description: What were once precision arcane instruments are now abstract sculptures of melted brass and crystal. The measurement scales have been fused at their maximum readings. One device  -  a planar resonance detector  -  is still faintly ticking, its needle pinned hard to the right. Whatever passed through here left a residual energy signature that's still measurable.

ambient: The mortar between stones glows faintly where old wards were placed.
Torchlight dances, casting long shadows down the corridor.
A crow calls from a distant tower.

2099.name: Restricted Server Room
2099.description: Banks of humming servers line the walls, their LEDs blinking in hypnotic patterns. Valuable data cores are scattered on a workbench.
ambient: A holographic street performer repeats its routine endlessly.
Bass thrums from a club somewhere below street level.
Someone's augmented laughter echoes  -  too perfect to be real.
Neon signs buzz and pop, casting everything in harsh pink.

3099.name: Smuggler's Cache
3099.description: A hidden room behind the dock wall. Crates of contraband are stacked to the ceiling.
ambient: Waves slap against the pilings with a hollow sound.
A foghorn sounds in the distance  -  long and mournful.
Salt air burns your nostrils.

4099.name: Armory Vault
4099.description: A reinforced vault containing military-grade equipment. Most of it is still functional.
ambient: A radio crackles with a frequency no one is broadcasting on.
A flag snaps in the wind, its colors faded beyond recognition.
The ground is scarred with craters and tank tracks.

5099.name: Astral Sanctum
5099.description: A pocket of concentrated astral energy. The air shimmers with raw power.
ambient: Colors here have sounds. Sounds have weight.
A thought that isn't yours passes through your mind and keeps going.
Reality ripples like a stone dropped in still water.

7099.name: Undercity Treasury
7099.description: A forgotten vault beneath the city. Gold coins and strange artifacts fill ancient coffers.
ambient: Stained glass casts colored light that moves against the sun.
Incense smoke forms shapes that dissolve before you can name them.
The pews creak as if occupied by invisible congregants.
The organ pipes hum with a note no one played.

2098.name: The Whispering Terminal
2098.description: A dead-end corridor with a blank screen. Faint text flickers: 'SPEAK THE LANGUAGE OF MACHINES'. The walls seem to listen. Perhaps the word 'binary' would mean something here.
ambient: Neon signs buzz and pop, casting everything in harsh pink.
The smell of synthetic food and ozone mingles in the alley.
Someone's augmented laughter echoes  -  too perfect to be real.
A holographic street performer repeats its routine endlessly.
Bass thrums from a club somewhere below street level.

2097.name: Digital Sanctum
2097.description: A hidden server room accessible only to those who speak the machine tongue. Holographic data streams cascade from ceiling to floor.
ambient: A holographic street performer repeats its routine endlessly.
Bass thrums from a club somewhere below street level.
Neon signs buzz and pop, casting everything in harsh pink.

4098.name: The Sealed Bunker Door
4098.description: A massive blast door with a voice-activated lock. A faded sign reads: 'AUTHORIZATION REQUIRED  -  STATE THE WATCHWORD'. Scratched into the frame: 'What keeps soldiers alive? Their...' The answer seems to be 'discipline'.
ambient: The ground is scarred with craters and tank tracks.
The silence between explosions feels louder than the blasts.
A flag snaps in the wind, its colors faded beyond recognition.

4097.name: Command Bunker
4097.description: A fortified underground command center. Maps and battle plans cover every surface. A cache of supplies sits in the corner.
ambient: A radio crackles with a frequency no one is broadcasting on.
Rubble shifts. Settling, probably. Hopefully.
The smell of phosphorus lingers like a bad memory.

6098.name: The Timeless Arch
6098.description: An ancient stone archway covered in temporal runes. The inscription reads: 'SPEAK WHAT FLOWS BUT CANNOT BE HELD'. The answer to this riddle is surely 'time'.
ambient: The air smells of a century that never existed.
Ancient runes glow briefly, then dim as if embarrassed.
A fossil in the wall blinks. You're almost sure of it.

6097.name: Temporal Vault
6097.description: A chamber outside of time itself. Objects from different eras float suspended in amber light. A clock with no hands ticks backwards.
ambient: Time moves differently here  -  your shadow lags behind you.
A fossil in the wall blinks. You're almost sure of it.
Dust here falls upward, then sideways, then gives up.

8098.name: Gravitational Anomaly
8098.description: Space warps around a shimmering point. A plaque reads: 'NAME THE FORCE THAT BINDS ALL THINGS'. The fundamental force is 'gravity'.
ambient: Gravity shifts subtly  -  your hair lifts for a moment.
A pebble floats upward, then crashes back down.
Light bends around an invisible point in the air.
The mirrors reflect angles that shouldn't exist.
Your stomach lurches as the pull changes direction.

8097.name: Zero-Point Chamber
8097.description: A room where gravity has no dominion. Everything floats  -  including you. Ancient technology hums with impossible energy.
ambient: Light bends around an invisible point in the air.
Gravity shifts subtly  -  your hair lifts for a moment.
A pebble floats upward, then crashes back down.
Your stomach lurches as the pull changes direction.
Sound travels strangely here  -  your voice arrives before you speak.

10098.name: The Final Gate
10098.description: A door of pure light. Etched in the frame: 'WHAT DO ALL SEEKERS PURSUE?' The answer that resonates is 'truth'.
ambient: The ground shifts beneath you  -  not physically, but conceptually.
A mirror shard reflects a version of you that looks worried.
A piece of another world drifts close, then veers away.
The sky is cracked. Through the cracks, you see other skies.
Fragments of broken reality float past like debris in a current.

10097.name: Chamber of Revelations
10097.description: A pristine white room. In the center, a pedestal holds a fragment of something familiar  -  round, smooth, impossibly dense. A marble fragment.
ambient: Fragments of broken reality float past like debris in a current.
The ground shifts beneath you  -  not physically, but conceptually.
The sky is cracked. Through the cracks, you see other skies.
A mirror shard reflects a version of you that looks worried.
Gravity works here, but it seems annoyed about it.

10012.name: The Cracked Obelisk
10012.description: A massive obelisk stands fractured and dark. Cracks run through it like veins. It once held reality together in this place.
ambient: Fragments of broken reality float past like debris in a current.
A piece of another world drifts close, then veers away.
Gravity works here, but it seems annoyed about it.
A mirror shard reflects a version of you that looks worried.
The sky is cracked. Through the cracks, you see other skies.

11012.name: Edge of the Void
11012.description: Beyond this point, there is nothing. Not darkness  -  nothing. The void stretches in every direction without end.

down.description: The void stretches below, but you sense nothing to anchor to. Perhaps if you had followed every trace of the marble...

ambient: The void doesn't watch you. It doesn't need to.
Even silence has abandoned this place.
Nothing moves here. Nothing can.
The absence of everything presses against your mind.

10005.name: Zone 1 Area
ambient: Nothing moves. For now.
Silence presses in from all sides.
The air is still.
The light here seems uncertain of itself.
A faint vibration passes through the floor.

11005.name: Zone 1 Area
ambient: Silence presses in from all sides.
A faint vibration passes through the floor.
The air is still.
The light here seems uncertain of itself.
Nothing moves. For now.

11099.name: The Heart of Everything
11099.description: You stand in a space that is not a space. The marble floats before you  -  impossibly small, impossibly dense, impossibly aware. It has been waiting. Not for you specifically, but for anyone persistent enough to follow its trail across eleven zones, through locked doors and hidden passages, past puzzles and guardians. It pulses once. The pulse says: 'You found me.' The world holds its breath.
ambient: Nothing moves here. Nothing can.
Your shadow doesn't exist here. Nothing to cast it on.
You are aware of your own existence more sharply than ever.
The void doesn't watch you. It doesn't need to.
